import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useChat } from '../contexts/ChatContext'; import { useWallet } from '../contexts/WalletContext'; import { useNFT } from '../contexts/NFTContext'; import { MessageSquare, Users, Lock, CheckCircle, XCircle, Crown, Plus, X, Trash2, AlertTriangle, LogOut } from 'lucide-react'; const Dashboard = () => { const { chatRooms, createRoom, deleteRoom, leaveRoom } = useChat(); const { walletAddress, ownedNFTs } = useWallet(); const { listNFTForSale } = useNFT(); const [showCreateRoom, setShowCreateRoom] = useState(false); const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(null); const [showLeaveConfirm, setShowLeaveConfirm] = useState(null); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('all'); // 'all', 'created', 'joined' const [roomForm, setRoomForm] = useState({ name: '', description: '', type: 'public', requiredNFT: '', mintPrice: '', maxSupply: '' }); const formatAddress = (address) => { return `${address.slice(0, 6)}...${address.slice(-4)}`; }; const handleCreateRoom = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (roomForm.name.trim() && roomForm.description.trim()) { createRoom({ ...roomForm, createdBy: walletAddress }); setRoomForm({ name: '', description: '', type: 'public', requiredNFT: '', mintPrice: '', maxSupply: '' }); setShowCreateRoom(false); } }; const handleInputChange = (field, value) => { setRoomForm(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value })); }; const handleDeleteRoom = (roomId) => { deleteRoom(roomId); setShowDeleteConfirm(null); }; const handleLeaveRoom = (roomId) => { leaveRoom(roomId); setShowLeaveConfirm(null); }; const createdRooms = chatRooms.filter(room => room.createdBy === walletAddress); const joinedRooms = chatRooms.filter(room => room.hasAccess && room.createdBy !== walletAddress); const getFilteredRooms = () => { switch (activeTab) { case 'created': return createdRooms; case 'joined': return joinedRooms; default: return chatRooms; } }; return (

{chatRooms.filter(room => room.hasAccess).length}

{ownedNFTs.length}

{chatRooms.reduce((sum, room) => sum + room.memberCount, 0)}

{/* Room Filter Tabs */}
{getFilteredRooms().map((room) => (

{room.name}

{room.createdBy === walletAddress && ( Creator )} {room.hasAccess ? ( ) : ( )} {room.isActive && (
)}

Required: {room.requiredNFT || 'None'} • {room.memberCount} members {room.createdAt && ( <> • Created: {room.createdAt.toLocaleDateString()} )}
{room.hasAccess ? ( Enter Room ) : ( )} {/* Delete button for created rooms */} {room.createdBy === walletAddress && ( )} {/* Leave button for joined rooms */} {room.hasAccess && room.createdBy !== walletAddress && ( )}
))}

Your NFTs

))}

handleInputChange('name', e.target.value)} placeholder="Enter room name" className="input-field" required />
